name: mal-mcp
description: Search and browse MyAnimeList anime/manga and manage your personal list.
long_description: MCP server for MyAnimeList. Reads (search, details, rankings, seasons, characters, recommendations, reviews, public profiles) are served via the public Jikan API and require no credentials. Personal-list tools (read/update/delete your own anime & manga list) use the official MyAnimeList API and require a user token; without one they return an actionable error. Works with any MCP client.

tools.name: search_anime
tools.description: Search anime by keyword.

tools.name: search_manga
tools.description: Search manga by keyword.

tools.name: get_manga

tools.name: get_manga_characters

tools.name: get_anime_staff

tools.name: get_random_manga

tools.name: get_manga_statistics

tools.name: get_top_people

tools.name: get_top_characters

tools.name: get_seasons_list
tools.description: List the years/seasons that have anime data.

tools.name: get_random_character
tools.description: A random character pick, with full details.

tools.name: get_random_person
tools.description: A random person pick, with full details.

tools.name: get_anime_news
tools.description: Recent news articles about an anime.

tools.name: get_my_user_info

tools.name: get_my_anime_list

tools.name: get_my_manga_list

tools.name: login_mal
tools.description: Authorize the personal-list tools with your MyAnimeList account (one-time).

tools.name: submit_mal_redirect
tools.description: Finish a login_mal authorization on a remote/headless host.

mal_client_id.title: MyAnimeList Client ID
mal_client_id.description: Optional. Makes 6 search/ranking read tools more resilient (no login needed). Also required for personal-list tools — run login_mal after setting this. Register an app of type 'other' at myanimelist.net/apiconfig. See docs/auth.md.

mal_refresh_token.title: MyAnimeList Refresh Token (advanced)
mal_refresh_token.description: Optional. Pre-supply a refresh token instead of running login_mal; enables silent auto-refresh. From the OAuth in docs/auth.md.

mal_access_token.title: MyAnimeList Access Token (advanced)
mal_access_token.description: Optional. Standalone token; works ~30 days with no refresh. Usually leave blank and use login_mal instead.
